class UserProfile:
    def __init__(self, username: str, email: str):
        self.username = username
        self.email = email
        self.display_name = username
        self.last_login = None

    def update_email(self, new_email: str) -> None:
        self.email = new_email
        self.last_login = "2024-01-01"

    def format_profile(self) -> str:
        return f"User: {self.display_name}, Email: {self.email}"


class ShoppingCart:
    def __init__(self):
        self.items: list[dict] = []
        self.discount = 0.0

    def add_item(self, item: dict) -> None:
        self.items.append(item)
        self.discount += item.get("discount", 0)

    def get_subtotal(self) -> float:
        return sum(i["price"] for i in self.items)

    def format_receipt(self) -> str:
        subtotal = self.get_subtotal()
        return f"Subtotal: ${subtotal:.2f}, Discount: ${self.discount:.2f}"


class Settings:
    def __init__(self):
        self.values: dict[str, str] = {}

    def set_value(self, key: str, value: str) -> None:
        self.values[key] = value

    def format_setting(self, key: str) -> str:
        return f"{key}={self.values.get(key, '')}"
